purpose: Define acceptable source material for expanding lunar calendar data beyond the current HKO 2023 candidate pack.

sourceTiers.name: official-machine-readable-data
sourceTiers.notes: Best source type because it can be checksummed, imported, and revalidated automatically.

sourceTiers.name: official-pdf-or-published-almanac
sourceTiers.notes: Can be a primary source only when publisher, edition, page, and extraction trail are recorded.

sourceTiers.name: professional-software-export
sourceTiers.notes: Requires software name, version, settings, export date, and sample screenshots.

sourceTiers.name: ordinary-webpage-or-screenshot
sourceTiers.notes: May help find discrepancies but cannot be the only source for runtime data.

notesForUser: The best material is a CSV, Excel, TXT, or official table covering many dates.
If the source is a book, provide the cover, copyright page, edition, and clear page photos.
If the source is software, provide software name, version, settings, and exported table.
